name: resume.generate
description: Generate an ATS-optimized resume draft tailored to a specific role. Uses Osman's profile — Security+, CySA+, IT support and cybersecurity background. Returns a plain text draft you can refine.

message.description: Role or job description to tailor the resume for, e.g. 'build me a resume for a GRC analyst role at a federal contractor'

examples: build me a resume for a GRC analyst role
generate a resume for the cybersecurity analyst position at Leidos
tailor my resume for a SOC analyst job
create a resume targeting federal IT security roles
